basic_details.job_title: CMD Kerala Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Administrative Officer and Accounts Executive Posts
basic_details.short_information: Centre for Management Development (CMD Kerala) Administrative Officer and Accounts Executive Notification 2026 has been released on 02 June 2026 on the official website www.CMD Kerala.kerala.gov.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the CMD Kerala Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBA/PG in Management/Administration, Company Secretaryship (ICSI), LLB, M.Com (Regular), CA/CMA Intermediate
qualification.details: Administrative Officer: Regular MBA/PG degree in Management/Administration from a recognized university or Company Secretaryship (under ICSI registration). LLB desirable. Total 15 years experience in handling Administration/HR matters of a reputed organization (5 years in middle or senior supervisory position). Good writing and oral communication skills in Malayalam and English. (Internal candidates and retired personnel with same qualifications and experience also eligible with specific conditions) Accounts Executive: Regular MBA(Finance)/M.Com (Regular) from a reputed institution with minimum 3 years experience in management accounting/project accounting/reporting, project team co-ordination/project analysis/data analysis OR CA/CMA Intermediate with 1 year experience in management accounting/project accounting/reporting, project team co-ordination/project analysis/data analysis. Proficiency in computerized accounting software and IT skills.

salary_details.pay_scale: Administrative Officer: Rs. 70,000 to Rs. 90,000 per month; Accounts Executive: Rs. 40,000/- to Rs. 53,000/-
salary_details.details: Administrative Officer: Rs. 70,000 to Rs. 90,000 per month depending on qualification and relevant experience Accounts Executive: Rs. 40,000/- to Rs. 53,000/-

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications and credentials Written Test Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CMD Kerala Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CMD Kerala to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CMD recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the CMD Administrative Officer and Accounts Executive posts is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Administrative Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Administrative Officer position, candidates need a Regular MBA/PG degree in Management/Administration or Company Secretaryship (ICSI). An LLB is desirable, and 15 years of relevant experience is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for the Accounts Executive role?
faq.answer: The Accounts Executive post offers a salary ranging from Rs. 40,000/- to Rs. 53,000/- per month, depending on the candidate's qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q4. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, the official notification indicates that there is no application fee for any category of candidates applying for these posts.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for these CMD vacancies?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a scrutiny of applications and credentials, followed by a written test, and finally, a personal interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available in this CMD recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by the Centre for Management Development for the posts of Administrative Officer and Accounts Executive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for the CMD recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to apply online for the CMD Administrative Officer and Accounts Executive positions through the official CMD website.

faq.question: Q8. Does CMD offer age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly mention age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for any specific information regarding age relaxation policies.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The recruitment for Administrative Officer and Accounts Executive posts at CMD is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The direct download link for the official notification PDF is available in the "Important Links" section of this article for your convenience.
